word: G1888 - ἐπαυτοφώρῳ - epautophṓrōi - ep-ow-tof-o'-ro - In the very act

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: In the very act
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1909 and G846 and (the dative singular of) a derivative of φώρ phōr (a thief); in theft itself, that is, (by analogy) in actual crime: - in the very act.
